channel.title: About on Corinne Chin | Video Journalist
channel.description: Recent content in About on Corinne Chin | Video Journalist

item.title: About
item.description: Corinne Chin is an Emmy-winning journalist and newsroom leader with a proven record of identifying and developing diverse talent on a global scale. As Director of Video Talent at The New York Times, she leads recruitment and development as the newsroom continues to expand its video journalism across the depth and breadth of the report: producing on-the-ground reporting, pioneering Visual Investigations and video podcasts that showcase the expertise of Times journalists.
